text:
ports/chinese/big5con updated to 0.92b, with agreement from the original
big5con port maintainer, hcchu.

Fix: 

Please commit it, thanks.
How-To-Repeat: fetch -o- ftp://freebsd.ntu.edu.tw/freebsd/woju/ports/big5con.tgz | \
   tar xvfz -C /usr/ports/chinese
cd /usr/ports/chinese/big5con
make package
